biological_replicate: mice one week after myocardial infarction (MI) surgery.
experimental_design: mice after myocardial infarction or sham surgery.
number_of_biological_replicates: Since the text does not specify the number of mice used, we assume at least one mouse is used.
number_of_samples: Since we have 1 biological replicate and no fractions, total samples = 1.
